title: Cue AI
byline: Eli Li Founder and CEO of Cue
excerpt: By running Gemma 4 E4B locally for dictation, Cue cut latency by 44%, increased feature usage by 30%, and dropped marginal inference costs to zero
content_html:
Building a faster voice agent pipeline with Gemma 4

By running Gemma 4 E4B locally for dictation, Cue cut latency by 44%, increased feature usage by 30%, and dropped marginal inference costs to zero

Cue is a voice-activated AI agent that lives on the user's desktop. Press a hotkey, speak, and Cue executes — from dictation in any app to agentic tasks that read the screen, choose the right tools, and act.

The mission is simple: make AI a natural extension of how people interact with their computer through voice, not typing. The keyboard, in Cue's vision, should be optional, not required, for everyday computing. That mission is only practical because of open models like Gemma, the kind a small team can run entirely on the user's own machine.

Polishing speech: Balancing authentic voice with speed

Voice input does not arrive as text. It arrives as a stream of raw Speech-to-Text (STT) output: filler words, missing punctuation, homophone errors, and self-corrections that the speaker meant to keep. Turning that stream into clean, high-fidelity text — fast enough to not interrupt the user experience — is the central engineering problem of any voice-first interface.

Anything beyond roughly 500 milliseconds between speaking and seeing the text feels like lag, and lag breaks the illusion that voice is faster than typing. Cue’s previous cloud-based polish step added 800–900 ms to every interaction. Furthermore, other models that the team tested tended to over-edit: smoothing casual speech into formal prose, dropping self-corrections, and erasing the speaker's voice in the process. The team wanted text that read like the user, not text that read like a model.

Integrating Gemma 4 E4B resulted in 44% faster latency, with the median latency dropping from 876 ms to 488 ms. The polish step now consistently completes inside the perceptual budget the team set for “feels faster than typing.”

Cue's polish pipeline is intentionally simple. The user holds a hotkey and speaks. Audio is transcribed to raw text via cloud STT. That raw text is then sent to Gemma 4 running locally on the user’s machine via Ollama with a compact ~400-token system prompt that encodes Cue's formatting rules:

  1. Restores punctuation and segments the stream into sentences
  2. Removes filler words across speech
  3. Corrects context-dependent homophones by reading the surrounding sentence
  4. Adapts formatting to the active input field (e.g., no trailing period for short commands like "open terminal," but full punctuation for an email composer).

The polished text is then pasted at the cursor through native OS APIs.

The full round-trip — speak, polish, insert — happens in well under a second. For a voice-first interface, this is the difference between a feature that feels like lag and a feature that feels like instant insertion. Since these improvements, Cue has seen ~30% more dictation per user. Users who previously dictated short messages started dictating longer ones and users who typically used typing for time-sensitive work stayed in voice mode.

Flipping the architecture: How constraints became features

Dictation in Cue is unlimited for every user, including the free tier. With Gemma 4 E4B running fully on-device, Cue's marginal costs for the polish step dropped to zero, making a feature that would otherwise have been capped or paywalled economically viable on the free tier.

The team initially planned to use Gemma only as an offline fallback, with the original assumption that a larger model would provide better accuracy. After running a benchmark on 227 real voice samples covering a mix of English and other languages, as well as mixed-language input, they decided Gemma should be the first choice model for text polishing. What the benchmark showed instead was that Gemma 4 has the right capacity to format and correct without over-editing. For text polish, that property is not a limitation; it is precisely the behavior the task requires.

Cue's deployment uses the base model with prompt engineering only. Active-app context (the application name, the field type, placeholder text where available) is injected into the prompt so the model knows whether the user is composing a Slack message, an email, or a terminal command. The cloud path remains in place as a fallback: if Ollama is not running, Cue's desktop app detects this at startup and routes to a cloud model so dictation continues to work without interruption.

This architecture — Gemma local as default, cloud as fallback — is the inversion of the team's original plan and the operational backbone of every dictation Cue users now do.

Driving the future of on-device voice agents

While Gemma currently handles polish, the team is expanding its role into two adjacent areas. The first is memory: a persistent local layer that learns each user's speaking style, vocabulary, and formatting preferences across sessions. This allows Cue's output to adapt to the user rather than enforcing a single house style. The second is the agent path. While Cue's agent mode currently relies on a cloud model, early evaluations show that Gemma 4's native function-calling—exposed directly through Ollama's tools API without a prompt-engineering shim—can successfully handle a meaningful share of self-contained tasks locally.

To evaluate polish latency, fidelity, and quality across hundreds of real voice samples, the team built a deterministic, reproducible benchmark suite and plan to share its evaluation methodology with the developer community. By opening up its eval harness, other teams building voice-first or local-first AI can run the same kind of structured local-vs-cloud comparison on their own workloads.

The bigger insight, in the team's view, is that the gap between local and cloud has narrowed faster than most product teams realize, and the only way to know which side of that line your task sits on is to measure it on real data. For Cue, that measurement led to a clear answer: on the workload that runs every time a user opens their mouth, Gemma 4 is the right model.

Explore on-device AI and start building your own impactful applications using Gemma today.

blocks.html_en: Cue is a voice-activated AI agent that lives on the user's desktop. Press a hotkey, speak, and Cue executes — from dictation in any app to agentic tasks that read the screen, choose the right tools, and act.

sentences.en: Press a hotkey, speak, and Cue executes — from dictation in any app to agentic tasks that read the screen, choose the right tools, and act.
sentences.zh: 按下热键，说话，Cue 就会执行——从任何应用程序中的听写到读取屏幕、选择正确工具并采取行动的代理任务。

sentences.en: The mission is simple: make AI a natural extension of how people interact with their computer through voice, not typing.
sentences.zh: 使命很简单：让人工智能成为人们通过语音（而不是打字）与计算机交互方式的自然延伸。

sentences.en: The keyboard, in Cue's vision, should be optional, not required, for everyday computing.
sentences.zh: 在 Cue 看来，键盘对于日常计算来说应该是可选的，而不是必需的。

sentences.en: That mission is only practical because of open models like Gemma, the kind a small team can run entirely on the user's own machine.
sentences.zh: 该任务之所以实用，是因为有像 Gemma 这样的开放模型，小团队可以完全在用户自己的机器上运行这种模型。

blocks.html_en: Polishing speech: Balancing authentic voice with speed

sentences.en: Polishing speech: Balancing authentic voice with speed
sentences.zh: 打磨语音：平衡真实的声音与速度

blocks.html_en: Voice input does not arrive as text. Turning that stream into clean, high-fidelity text — fast enough to not interrupt the user experience — is the central engineering problem of any voice-first interface.

sentences.en: Voice input does not arrive as text.
sentences.zh: 语音输入不会以文本形式到达。

sentences.en: It arrives as a stream of raw Speech-to-Text (STT) output: filler words, missing punctuation, homophone errors, and self-corrections that the speaker meant to keep.
sentences.zh: 它以原始语音转文本 (STT) 输出流的形式到达：填充词、缺失的标点符号、同音词错误以及说话者想要保留的自我更正。

sentences.en: Turning that stream into clean, high-fidelity text — fast enough to not interrupt the user experience — is the central engineering problem of any voice-first interface.
sentences.zh: 将流转换为干净、高保真的文本（速度足够快，不会中断用户体验）是任何语音优先界面的核心工程问题。

blocks.html_en: Anything beyond roughly 500 milliseconds between speaking and seeing the text feels like lag, and lag breaks the illusion that voice is faster than typing. Furthermore, other models that the team tested tended to over-edit: smoothing casual speech into formal prose, dropping self-corrections, and erasing the speaker's voice in the process. The team wanted text that read like the user, not text that read like a model.

sentences.en: Anything beyond roughly 500 milliseconds between speaking and seeing the text feels like lag, and lag breaks the illusion that voice is faster than typing.
sentences.zh: 说话和看到文本之间任何超过大约 500 毫秒的时间都会让人感觉有延迟，而延迟打破了语音比打字快的错觉。

sentences.en: Cue’s previous cloud-based polish step added 800–900 ms to every interaction.
sentences.zh: Cue 之前基于云的优化步骤为每次交互增加了 800-900 毫秒。

sentences.en: Furthermore, other models that the team tested tended to over-edit: smoothing casual speech into formal prose, dropping self-corrections, and erasing the speaker's voice in the process.
sentences.zh: 此外，团队测试的其他模型往往会过度编辑：将随意的演讲平滑成正式的散文，放弃自我更正，并在此过程中删除说话者的声音。

sentences.en: The team wanted text that read like the user, not text that read like a model.
sentences.zh: 团队希望文本读起来像用户，而不是读起来像模型的文本。

blocks.html_en: Integrating Gemma 4 E4B resulted in 44% faster latency, with the median latency dropping from 876 ms to 488 ms. The polish step now consistently completes inside the perceptual budget the team set for “feels faster than typing.”

sentences.en: Integrating Gemma 4 E4B resulted in 44% faster latency, with the median latency dropping from 876 ms to 488 ms.
sentences.zh: 集成 Gemma 4 E4B 使延迟缩短了 44%，中位延迟从 876 毫秒降至 488 毫秒。

sentences.en: The polish step now consistently completes inside the perceptual budget the team set for “feels faster than typing.”
sentences.zh: 现在，润色步骤始终在团队设定的“感觉比打字更快”的感知预算内完成。

sentences.en: Polish-step latency was measured on Apple Silicon (M-series) via Ollama, on a 227-sample real-voice benchmark covering English and mixed-language input.
sentences.zh: 波兰步延迟是通过 Ollama 在 Apple Silicon（M 系列）上基于涵盖英语和混合语言输入的 227 个样本真实语音基准进行测量的。

sentences.en: Per-user dictation usage measured across active beta users in the four weeks before and after the default switch.
sentences.zh: 在默认切换前后的四个星期内，测量了活跃测试版用户的每用户听写使用情况。

sentences.en: Figures current as of May 2026.
sentences.zh: 截至 2026 年 5 月的最新数据。

sentences.zh: Cue 的抛光流程故意变得简单。

sentences.en: The user holds a hotkey and speaks.
sentences.zh: 用户按住热键并讲话。

sentences.zh: 音频通过云 STT 转录为原始文本。

sentences.zh: 然后，该原始文本通过 Ollama 发送到在用户计算机上本地运行的 Gemma 4，并带有一个紧凑的约 400 个令牌的系统提示符，该提示符对 Cue 的格式化规则进行了编码：

blocks.html_en: • Restores punctuation and segments the stream into sentences

sentences.en: Restores punctuation and segments the stream into sentences
sentences.zh: 恢复标点符号并将流分段为句子

blocks.html_en: • Removes filler words across speech

sentences.en: Removes filler words across speech
sentences.zh: 删除语音中的填充词

blocks.html_en: • Corrects context-dependent homophones by reading the surrounding sentence

sentences.en: Corrects context-dependent homophones by reading the surrounding sentence
sentences.zh: 通过阅读周围的句子来纠正上下文相关的同音词

blocks.html_en: • Adapts formatting to the active input field (e.g., no trailing period for short commands like "open terminal," but full punctuation for an email composer).

sentences.en: Adapts formatting to the active input field (e.g., no trailing period for short commands like "open terminal," but full punctuation for an email composer).
sentences.zh: 使格式适应活动输入字段（例如，“打开终端”等短命令没有尾随句点，但电子邮件编辑器使用完整标点符号）。

blocks.html_en: The polished text is then pasted at the cursor through native OS APIs.

sentences.en: The polished text is then pasted at the cursor through native OS APIs.
sentences.zh: 然后通过本机操作系统 API 将经过修饰的文本粘贴到光标处。

Users who previously dictated short messages started dictating longer ones and users who typically used typing for time-sensitive work stayed in voice mode.

sentences.zh: 完整的往返过程——说话、润色、插入——发生在不到一秒的时间内。

sentences.en: For a voice-first interface, this is the difference between a feature that feels like lag and a feature that feels like instant insertion.
sentences.zh: 对于语音优先的界面来说，这就是感觉像是滞后的功能和感觉像是即时插入的功能之间的区别。

sentences.en: Since these improvements, Cue has seen ~30% more dictation per user.
sentences.zh: 自这些改进以来，Cue 的每位用户听写量增加了约 30%。

sentences.en: Users who previously dictated short messages started dictating longer ones and users who typically used typing for time-sensitive work stayed in voice mode.
sentences.zh: 以前听写短消息的用户开始听写较长的消息，而通常使用打字进行时间敏感工作的用户则保持语音模式。

blocks.html_en: Flipping the architecture: How constraints became features

sentences.zh: 翻转架构：约束如何变成功能

blocks.html_en: Dictation in Cue is unlimited for every user, including the free tier. With Gemma 4 E4B running fully on-device, Cue's marginal costs for the polish step dropped to zero, making a feature that would otherwise have been capped or paywalled economically viable on the free tier.

sentences.en: Dictation in Cue is unlimited for every user, including the free tier.
sentences.zh: Cue 中的听写对每个用户都是无限制的，包括免费套餐。

sentences.en: With Gemma 4 E4B running fully on-device, Cue's marginal costs for the polish step dropped to zero, making a feature that would otherwise have been capped or paywalled economically viable on the free tier.
sentences.zh: 随着 Gemma 4 E4B 完全在设备上运行，Cue 的优化步骤的边际成本降至零，从而使原本会受到限制或付费的功能在免费套餐上变得经济可行。

What the benchmark showed instead was that Gemma 4 has the right capacity to format and correct without over-editing. For text polish, that property is not a limitation; it is precisely the behavior the task requires.

sentences.en: The team initially planned to use Gemma only as an offline fallback, with the original assumption that a larger model would provide better accuracy.
sentences.zh: 该团队最初计划仅使用 Gemma 作为离线后备，最初假设更大的模型将提供更好的准确性。

sentences.en: After running a benchmark on 227 real voice samples covering a mix of English and other languages, as well as mixed-language input, they decided Gemma should be the first choice model for text polishing.
sentences.zh: 在对涵盖英语和其他语言以及混合语言输入的 227 个真实语音样本进行基准测试后，他们认为 Gemma 应该成为文本润色的首选模型。

sentences.en: What the benchmark showed instead was that Gemma 4 has the right capacity to format and correct without over-editing.
sentences.zh: 相反，基准测试显示 Gemma 4 具有正确的格式化和纠正能力，而无需过度编辑。

sentences.en: For text polish, that property is not a limitation; it is precisely the behavior the task requires.
sentences.zh: 对于文本修饰，该属性不是限制；这正是任务所要求的行为。

blocks.html_en: Cue's deployment uses the base model with prompt engineering only. Active-app context (the application name, the field type, placeholder text where available) is injected into the prompt so the model knows whether the user is composing a Slack message, an email, or a terminal command. The cloud path remains in place as a fallback: if Ollama is not running, Cue's desktop app detects this at startup and routes to a cloud model so dictation continues to work without interruption.

sentences.en: Cue's deployment uses the base model with prompt engineering only.
sentences.zh: Cue 的部署仅使用具有即时工程的基本模型。

sentences.en: Active-app context (the application name, the field type, placeholder text where available) is injected into the prompt so the model knows whether the user is composing a Slack message, an email, or a terminal command.
sentences.zh: 活动应用程序上下文（应用程序名称、字段类型、可用的占位符文本）被注入到提示中，以便模型知道用户是否正在撰写 Slack 消息、电子邮件或终端命令。

sentences.en: The cloud path remains in place as a fallback: if Ollama is not running, Cue's desktop app detects this at startup and routes to a cloud model so dictation continues to work without interruption.
sentences.zh: 云路径仍然保留作为后备：如果 Ollama 未运行，Cue 的桌面应用程序会在启动时检测到这一情况并路由到云模型，以便听写继续工作而不会中断。

blocks.html_en: This architecture — Gemma local as default, cloud as fallback — is the inversion of the team's original plan and the operational backbone of every dictation Cue users now do.

sentences.en: This architecture — Gemma local as default, cloud as fallback — is the inversion of the team's original plan and the operational backbone of every dictation Cue users now do.
sentences.zh: 这种架构——Gemma 本地作为默认，云作为后备——是团队最初计划的倒转，也是 Cue 用户现在所做的每个听写的操作骨干。

blocks.html_en: We expected Gemma to be a fallback for offline mode. After we ran the benchmark on real voice samples, we flipped the architecture — Gemma is the default for polish now, and cloud model is the fallback. The constraint we thought was a downside turned out to be exactly what the task needed.

sentences.en: We expected Gemma to be a fallback for offline mode.
sentences.zh: 我们预计 Gemma 会成为离线模式的后备方案。

sentences.en: After we ran the benchmark on real voice samples, we flipped the architecture — Gemma is the default for polish now, and cloud model is the fallback.
sentences.zh: 在对真实语音样本进行基准测试后，我们翻转了架构——Gemma 是现在默认的抛光模式，云模型是后备模式。

sentences.en: The constraint we thought was a downside turned out to be exactly what the task needed.
sentences.zh: 我们认为是不利因素的限制事实证明正是任务所需要的。

blocks.html_en: We expected Gemma to be a fallback for offline mode. After we ran the benchmark on real voice samples, we flipped the architecture — Gemma is the default for polish now, and cloud model is the fallback. The constraint we thought was a downside turned out to be exactly what the task needed.

sentences.en: We expected Gemma to be a fallback for offline mode.
sentences.zh: 我们预计 Gemma 会成为离线模式的后备方案。

sentences.en: After we ran the benchmark on real voice samples, we flipped the architecture — Gemma is the default for polish now, and cloud model is the fallback.
sentences.zh: 在对真实语音样本进行基准测试后，我们翻转了架构——Gemma 是现在默认的抛光模式，云模型是后备模式。

sentences.en: The constraint we thought was a downside turned out to be exactly what the task needed.
sentences.zh: 我们认为是不利因素的限制事实证明正是任务所需要的。

blocks.html_en: Driving the future of on-device voice agents

sentences.en: Driving the future of on-device voice agents
sentences.zh: 推动设备上语音代理的未来

blocks.html_en: While Gemma currently handles polish, the team is expanding its role into two adjacent areas. The first is memory: a persistent local layer that learns each user's speaking style, vocabulary, and formatting preferences across sessions. This allows Cue's output to adapt to the user rather than enforcing a single house style. The second is the agent path. While Cue's agent mode currently relies on a cloud model, early evaluations show that Gemma 4's native function-calling—exposed directly through Ollama's tools API without a prompt-engineering shim—can successfully handle a meaningful share of self-contained tasks locally.

sentences.en: While Gemma currently handles polish, the team is expanding its role into two adjacent areas.
sentences.zh: 虽然杰玛目前负责抛光工作，但该团队正在将其职责扩展到两个相邻的领域。

sentences.en: The first is memory: a persistent local layer that learns each user's speaking style, vocabulary, and formatting preferences across sessions.
sentences.zh: 第一个是记忆：一个持久的本地层，可以在会话中学习每个用户的说话风格、词汇和格式偏好。

sentences.en: This allows Cue's output to adapt to the user rather than enforcing a single house style.
sentences.zh: 这使得 Cue 的输出能够适应用户，而不是强制执行单一的 house 风格。

sentences.en: The second is the agent path.
sentences.zh: 第二个是代理路径。

sentences.en: While Cue's agent mode currently relies on a cloud model, early evaluations show that Gemma 4's native function-calling—exposed directly through Ollama's tools API without a prompt-engineering shim—can successfully handle a meaningful share of self-contained tasks locally.
sentences.zh: 虽然 Cue 的代理模式目前依赖于云模型，但早期评估表明，Gemma 4 的本机函数调用（通过 Ollama 的工具 API 直接公开，无需提示工程填充程序）可以成功地在本地处理大量有意义的独立任务。

blocks.html_en: To evaluate polish latency, fidelity, and quality across hundreds of real voice samples, the team built a deterministic, reproducible benchmark suite and plan to share its evaluation methodology with the developer community. By opening up its eval harness, other teams building voice-first or local-first AI can run the same kind of structured local-vs-cloud comparison on their own workloads.

sentences.en: To evaluate polish latency, fidelity, and quality across hundreds of real voice samples, the team built a deterministic, reproducible benchmark suite and plan to share its evaluation methodology with the developer community.
sentences.zh: 为了评估数百个真实语音样本的抛光延迟、保真度和质量，该团队构建了一个确定性的、可重复的基准套件，并计划与开发者社区分享其评估方法。

sentences.en: By opening up its eval harness, other teams building voice-first or local-first AI can run the same kind of structured local-vs-cloud comparison on their own workloads.
sentences.zh: 通过开放其评估工具，构建语音优先或本地优先人工智能的其他团队可以在自己的工作负载上运行相同类型的结构化本地与云比较。

blocks.html_en: The bigger insight, in the team's view, is that the gap between local and cloud has narrowed faster than most product teams realize, and the only way to know which side of that line your task sits on is to measure it on real data. For Cue, that measurement led to a clear answer: on the workload that runs every time a user opens their mouth, Gemma 4 is the right model.

sentences.en: The bigger insight, in the team's view, is that the gap between local and cloud has narrowed faster than most product teams realize, and the only way to know which side of that line your task sits on is to measure it on real data.
sentences.zh: 在该团队看来，更重要的见解是，本地和云之间的差距缩小的速度比大多数产品团队意识到的要快，而了解您的任务位于这条线的哪一边的唯一方法是根据真实数据进行衡量。

sentences.en: For Cue, that measurement led to a clear answer: on the workload that runs every time a user opens their mouth, Gemma 4 is the right model.
sentences.zh: 对于 Cue 来说，这一测量得出了一个明确的答案：就用户每次张嘴时运行的工作负载而言，Gemma 4 是正确的模型。

blocks.html_en: Explore on-device AI and start building your own impactful applications using Gemma today.

sentences.en: Explore on-device AI and start building your own impactful applications using Gemma today.
sentences.zh: 立即探索设备上人工智能并开始使用 Gemma 构建您自己的有影响力的应用程序。

content_html_zh:
使用 Gemma 4 构建更快的语音代理管道

通过在本地运行 Gemma 4 E4B 进行听写，Cue 将延迟减少了 44%，将功能使用率提高了 30%，并将边际推理成本降至零

Cue 是一个位于用户桌面上的语音激活人工智能代理。 按下热键，说话，Cue 就会执行——从任何应用程序中的听写到读取屏幕、选择正确工具并采取行动的代理任务。

使命很简单：让人工智能成为人们通过语音（而不是打字）与计算机交互方式的自然延伸。 在 Cue 看来，键盘对于日常计算来说应该是可选的，而不是必需的。 该任务之所以实用，是因为有像 Gemma 这样的开放模型，小团队可以完全在用户自己的机器上运行这种模型。

打磨语音：平衡真实的声音与速度

语音输入不会以文本形式到达。 它以原始语音转文本 (STT) 输出流的形式到达：填充词、缺失的标点符号、同音词错误以及说话者想要保留的自我更正。 将流转换为干净、高保真的文本（速度足够快，不会中断用户体验）是任何语音优先界面的核心工程问题。

说话和看到文本之间任何超过大约 500 毫秒的时间都会让人感觉有延迟，而延迟打破了语音比打字快的错觉。 Cue 之前基于云的优化步骤为每次交互增加了 800-900 毫秒。 此外，团队测试的其他模型往往会过度编辑：将随意的演讲平滑成正式的散文，放弃自我更正，并在此过程中删除说话者的声音。 团队希望文本读起来像用户，而不是读起来像模型的文本。

集成 Gemma 4 E4B 使延迟缩短了 44%，中位延迟从 876 毫秒降至 488 毫秒。 现在，润色步骤始终在团队设定的“感觉比打字更快”的感知预算内完成。

Cue 的抛光流程故意变得简单。 用户按住热键并讲话。 音频通过云 STT 转录为原始文本。 然后，该原始文本通过 Ollama 发送到在用户计算机上本地运行的 Gemma 4，并带有一个紧凑的约 400 个令牌的系统提示符，该提示符对 Cue 的格式化规则进行了编码：

  1. 恢复标点符号并将流分段为句子
  2. 删除语音中的填充词
  3. 通过阅读周围的句子来纠正上下文相关的同音词
  4. 使格式适应活动输入字段（例如，“打开终端”等短命令没有尾随句点，但电子邮件编辑器使用完整标点符号）。

然后通过本机操作系统 API 将经过修饰的文本粘贴到光标处。

完整的往返过程——说话、润色、插入——发生在不到一秒的时间内。 对于语音优先的界面来说，这就是感觉像是滞后的功能和感觉像是即时插入的功能之间的区别。 自这些改进以来，Cue 的每位用户听写量增加了约 30%。 以前听写短消息的用户开始听写较长的消息，而通常使用打字进行时间敏感工作的用户则保持语音模式。

翻转架构：约束如何变成功能

Cue 中的听写对每个用户都是无限制的，包括免费套餐。 随着 Gemma 4 E4B 完全在设备上运行，Cue 的优化步骤的边际成本降至零，从而使原本会受到限制或付费的功能在免费套餐上变得经济可行。

该团队最初计划仅使用 Gemma 作为离线后备，最初假设更大的模型将提供更好的准确性。 在对涵盖英语和其他语言以及混合语言输入的 227 个真实语音样本进行基准测试后，他们认为 Gemma 应该成为文本润色的首选模型。 相反，基准测试显示 Gemma 4 具有正确的格式化和纠正能力，而无需过度编辑。 对于文本修饰，该属性不是限制；这正是任务所要求的行为。

Cue 的部署仅使用具有即时工程的基本模型。 活动应用程序上下文（应用程序名称、字段类型、可用的占位符文本）被注入到提示中，以便模型知道用户是否正在撰写 Slack 消息、电子邮件或终端命令。 云路径仍然保留作为后备：如果 Ollama 未运行，Cue 的桌面应用程序会在启动时检测到这一情况并路由到云模型，以便听写继续工作而不会中断。

这种架构——Gemma 本地作为默认，云作为后备——是团队最初计划的倒转，也是 Cue 用户现在所做的每个听写的操作骨干。

推动设备上语音代理的未来

虽然杰玛目前负责抛光工作，但该团队正在将其职责扩展到两个相邻的领域。 第一个是记忆：一个持久的本地层，可以在会话中学习每个用户的说话风格、词汇和格式偏好。 这使得 Cue 的输出能够适应用户，而不是强制执行单一的 house 风格。 第二个是代理路径。 虽然 Cue 的代理模式目前依赖于云模型，但早期评估表明，Gemma 4 的本机函数调用（通过 Ollama 的工具 API 直接公开，无需提示工程填充程序）可以成功地在本地处理大量有意义的独立任务。

为了评估数百个真实语音样本的抛光延迟、保真度和质量，该团队构建了一个确定性的、可重复的基准套件，并计划与开发者社区分享其评估方法。 通过开放其评估工具，构建语音优先或本地优先人工智能的其他团队可以在自己的工作负载上运行相同类型的结构化本地与云比较。

在该团队看来，更重要的见解是，本地和云之间的差距缩小的速度比大多数产品团队意识到的要快，而了解您的任务位于这条线的哪一边的唯一方法是根据真实数据进行衡量。 对于 Cue 来说，这一测量得出了一个明确的答案：就用户每次张嘴时运行的工作负载而言，Gemma 4 是正确的模型。

立即探索设备上人工智能并开始使用 Gemma 构建您自己的有影响力的应用程序。
